General.Name: Palace Banquet Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Welife Technology Limited, an investment holding company, operates restaurants in Hong Kong and People's Republic of China. The company offers Cantonese dining and banquet services, including wedding banquet services. It operates Chinese full-service restaurants under the Palace, Royal Courtyard, and Sea Moon Cuisine brand names. The company was formerly known as The Palace Holdings Limited and changed its name to Palace Banquet Holdings Limited in October 2018. Welife Technology Limited was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.

3.Name: Mr. Man Kit  Lam FCCA, HKICPA
3.Title: Company Secretary
